name: Lou Marini
abstract: Louis Eugene Marini Jr. (born May 13, 1945), known as "Blue Lou" Marini,  is an American saxophonist, arranger, and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: We had the band with Lou Marini, Alan Rubin, Howard Johnson, Paul Shaffer — we kind of started a trend.

about_quotes.evidence: That’s a fun thing to watch when Lou Marini came out of the sarcopha— or whatever you call that.
